keyFactors: Switzerland has a significantly higher Elo rating (1655) compared to Qatar (1494).
Switzerland's recent form is stronger at 2.1 compared to Qatar's 1.2.
Qatar hasn't played a match in 194 days, which may affect their match readiness.
The match is played at a neutral venue, minimizing any potential host advantage.
risks: Lack of head-to-head history makes predictions on direct matchup less certain.
Switzerland's clean sheet rate is slightly higher, but they still concede over 1 goal per match on average.
Qatar's goals for average is relatively close to their expected goals, which could indicate potential to score more.
